title: Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Roasted marinated chicken chunks in a spiced curry sauce, known for its vibrant orange color and rich flavor.
steps: Marinate chicken with yogurt and half the tikka masala for 2 hours.
Grill or pan-fry the chicken until cooked and slightly charred.
In a separate pan, sauté onions, add remaining spices and tomato puree.
Simmer the sauce until thick, then add the cooked chicken.
Stir in cream and simmer for 3 minutes. Garnish with coriander.

instructions.description: Marinate chicken with yogurt and half the tikka masala for 2 hours.

instructions.title: Cooking Process
instructions.description: Grill or pan-fry the chicken until cooked and slightly charred.

instructions.title: Cooking Process
instructions.description: In a separate pan, sauté onions, add remaining spices and tomato puree.

instructions.title: Cooking Process
instructions.description: Simmer the sauce until thick, then add the cooked chicken.

instructions.title: Finishing Touches
instructions.description: Stir in cream and simmer for 3 minutes. Garnish with coriander.

cookingTips: For the best Chicken Tikka Masala, always use fresh, high-quality ingredients.
Do not rush the cooking process; allow the flavors to meld naturally.
Adjust the spices according to your personal taste preference.

faq.question: Can I make Chicken Tikka Masala ahead of time?
faq.answer: Yes, you can prepare the ingredients in advance, but it's best served fresh.

faq.question: How do I store the leftovers?
faq.answer: Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.

faq.question: Can I freeze this dish?
faq.answer: It is generally not recommended to freeze this as it may alter the texture.
